title: MyceliumProjectManifest
description: The JSON projection of `mycelium-proj.toml` (the Nodule-Header-and-Project-Manifest spec §2, Accepted 2026-06-16). The TOML manifest is the default source every nodule header inherits from. v0 types and validates the closed `[project]` table (the fields headers inherit); the optional `[surface]`/`[dependencies]`/`[toolchain]`/`[spore]` tables are accepted but not interpreted yet (their consumers are M-361). Metadata is NOT identity (ADR-003).

x-mycelium.$comment: The reader (mycelium-proj::manifest) is a minimal, no-new-dependency TOML SUBSET (strings/arrays/inline-tables/booleans, single-line values) — honestly a subset, named as one; an out-of-subset construct is an explicit error (G2). As with the header, SPDX *membership* and calendar-date range are code checks, not regex. `[project]` is a closed key set (additionalProperties:false); the optional tables are loose objects in v0.

kind.description: The project shape (§2): library | program | script.
